title: Qatargate: Belgium seeks to lift immunity for former Commissioner
summary_full: Belgian authorities have launched a procedure that could result in an arrest warrant being issued for former EU Migration Commissioner Dimitris Avramopoulos, due to his alleged involvement in the Qatargate scandal. The former Commissioner served on the board of Fight Impunity, an NGO founded by Antonio Panzeri, the former MEP at the centre of the […]
